new_value:
{"description":"Implement the analysis engine: load prompt files with YAML frontmatter, resolve depends_on DAG, inject {sessions}/{patterns}/{workflows} template variables, call LLM backend, extract JSON with retry logic.

Define AnalysisResult and ResultMetadata dataclasses (output types of this stage):
- AnalysisResult: timestamp, session_count, sessions_skipped, workflows, patterns, crystallization, custom, metadata
- ResultMetadata: backend, model, condensation_mode, prompt_versions (dict analyzer_id->version), duration_ms

CLI backend mode: shell out via TOML config. Built-in backend: claude_cli.toml. Command format: pipe prompt via stdin ('echo "$prompt" | claude -p') rather than shell argument to avoid quoting/length issues. context_limit=180000.

Built-in prompts: workflows.md, patterns.md, crystallize.md (all three from the spec). JSON extraction with one retry on parse failure."}
